category_sources: Official Jetty repository and documentation describe Jetty as a Java web container/server and include runner artifacts.
source_facts.description says Jetty Runner lets users use Jetty without an installed distribution.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jetty-runner; official Jetty build documentation names the Jetty Runner distribution.
docs_sources: Official Jetty Javadocs document the Jetty 11 Runner class matching the Homebrew package major version.
Official Jetty documentation index is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Jetty GitHub repository is jetty/jetty.project and includes the Jetty Runner build artifacts.
tags_sources: Official Jetty docs and Javadocs identify Runner as part of the Jetty Java server project.
source_facts.description identifies the no-distribution Jetty runner use case.
